title: FOSTER OR ADOPTIVE PARENT INQUIRY LINE - 211info
text: OREGON STATE DEPARTMENT OF HUMAN SERVICES CHILD WELFARE ADMINISTRATIVE OFFICE FOSTER OR ADOPTIVE PARENT INQUIRY LINE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Information and referral for prospective resource parents and/or adopting parents. Provides information for adopting and/or fostering children that are currently in state care and DHS custody only. 500 Summer Street NE Suite E67 Salem, OR 97301 Eligibility: Individuals who are interested in becoming resource parents or adopting a child that is being cared for by the state Hours: Monday-Friday 8:30am-5pm - (800) 331-0503 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Toll-free (800) 331-0503 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information or contact online through website FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: State of Oregon SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Services: Adoptive Family Recruitment Foster Parent/Family Recruitment Other Services Offered At This Location: COMMUNITY GROUPS AND GOVERNMENT/ADMINISTRATIVE OFFICES - CHILDREN, YOUTH AND FAMILIES INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - INDEPENDENT LIVING PROGRAM INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - SUPPORT A FOSTER CHILD PUBLIC ASSISTANCE PROGRAMS - CHILD CARE REIMBURSEMENT FOR RESOURCE PARENTS AND RELATIVE CAREGIVERS If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. OREGON STATE DEPARTMENT OF HUMAN SERVICES CHILD WELFARE ADMINISTRATIVE OFFICE
